name: Seasonal Swing, LLC
about: Seasonal Swing, LLC is an indoor golf simulation and entertainment center located in downtown Hillsdale. The facility utilizes aboutGolf simulators with 3TRAK® ball and club tracking technology, chosen for their accuracy and ease of use. Open 24/7 by keycode access, the venue aims to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game while providing a fun local activity, with a focus on community and accessibility.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with keycode entry for flexible practice times
High-accuracy aboutGolf 3TRAK® technology for realistic ball and club tracking
Family-oriented environment with membership options for multiple players
Convenient downtown Hillsdale location with on-site parking

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor golf simulator with ball and club tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs as the facility does not provide rental equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The BYOB policy is not explicitly stated on the website, so it's recommended to contact the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing information for 18-hole rounds.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Seasonal Swing offers family memberships and promotes itself as a fun activity for all ages.
